title: COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM - 211info
text: YAMHILL COUNTY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES SERVICES COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a range of support services to individuals experiencing intellectual and/or developmental disabilities. Services can include case management; individual and family support plans; access to brokerage services for transportation; in-home supports or residential placement; and employment and vocational services. 330 NE Kirby Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Individuals with an intellectual or developmental disability. Applicants must be an Oregon resident and a US citizen. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 434-7460 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 434-7460 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to request an application for Developmental Disabilities services. An appointment will be scheduled with an eligibility worker who can help you through the application process. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of citizenship, proof of address, and records for all psychological and medical assessments related to the disability AREA SERVED: Yamhill County Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Disabilities Issues Case/Care Management * Disabilities Issues Disability Related Center Based Employment Disability Related Parenting Programs Disability Related Transportation Home/Community Based Developmental Disabilities Programs Residential Placement Services for People with Disabilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YAMHILL COUNTY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES SERVICES
